data.title: ETH to $22,000: Ethereum Long-Term Target Impresses Investors, but This Viral Layer-2 Crypto Will Shock Everyone First
data.description:
Ethereum’s moonshot price target—$22,000 by 2030, projected by VanEck—is grabbing headlines and turning heads. The bold forecast, based on Ethereum’s staking yield, institutional growth, and DeFi dominance, has been reported by VanEck and echoed by CoinDesk. It’s a massive vision with long-term implications. However, while ETH might take years to fulfill that promise, another crypto. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/eth-to-22000-ethereum-long-term-target-impresses-investors-but-this-viral-layer-2-crypto-will-shock-everyone-first/

data.title: Pundit Warns XRP Investors To Not Make This Grave Mistake This Cycle
data.description:
A powerful message has emerged from a recent episode of the Good Evening Crypto YouTube show that urged XRP holders to rethink their exit strategy ahead of what may be one of the most pivotal crypto cycles yet. Host Abdullah Nassif “Abs” issued a strong caution against selling XRP by pointing to a combination of regulatory progress and tokenization of real-world assets as signs that the current cycle may just be getting started for the XRP price. The One Rule XRP Holders Must Remember Abs amplified a sentiment shared by a speaker who stressed that XRP holders should not sell, especially not during the coming price spikes. “Hold a minimum of 10,000 units in a cold storage,” the speaker said
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/xrp/xrp-investors-grave-mistake/

data.title: Trump supports a de minimis tax exemption for Bitcoin payments: White House
data.description:
White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt said the Trump administration is looking into a de minimis tax exemption for Bitcoin transactions under $600. This is to make it easier for Americans to use Bitcoin and other cryptos on a day-to-day basis. Karoline Leavitt revealed that President Trump has already signaled support for the exemption and […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-supports-a-de-minimis-tax-for-bitcoin/

data.title: Historic Crypto Policy Win: Three Bills Clear House Despite Democrat Opposition
data.description:
Three key pieces of crypto legislation—including the GENIUS Act and the CLARITY Act—passed the House of Representatives on Thursday afternoon, indicating a landmark moment for crypto policy in the U.S. BREAKING: U.S
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/crypto-industry-scores-major-policy-victory-as-all-three-bills-pass-house/

data.title: Federal Reserve Governor Advocates for July Rate Cut
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller has suggested that the Federal Reserve should consider a 25 basis point interest rate cut during its July meeting. This recommendation comes amid ongoing discussions about the economic outlook and monetary policy adjustments.

data.title: Why Bitcoin DeFi Protocols Are Seeing Impressive Growth As BTC Soars
data.description:
The rising price of Bitcoin (BTC) is having a major impact on Bitcoin decentralized finance (DeFi). Data from DefiLIama shows Bitcoin-based DeFi protocols’ total value locked (TVL) went from $304. 66 million on Jan 1, 2024, to a whopping $7. 117 billion at the time of writing
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitcoin-defi-protocols-impressive-growth-btc-soars/
